ModMetadata.Name: Entropy.Processor
ModMetadata.Description: [h1]Entropy.Processor[/h1] Integrated Circuit processor replacement for Stationeers. Has better performance and supports easy extensibility. [h2]Uninstall[h2] To remove all Entropy mods safely, follow this instruction: [olist][*] Remove all Entropy mods except [b]Entropy.Common[/b] [*] Load and save the game, exit [*] Remove [b]Entropy.Common[/b] mod. [/olist] Discussion: [url=https://discord.com/channels/1370137389837717545/1476117082906296451]Discord[/url] Source code: [url=https://github.com/Aberro/Entropy]Github[/url] [b]WARNING:[/b] This is a StationeersLaunchPad Plugin Mod. It requires Bepinex to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin. See: [url=https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad]StationeersLaunchPad Github page[/url]
ModMetadata.InGameDescription:
Entropy.Processor Integrated Circuit processor replacement for Stationeers. Has better performance and supports easy extensibility.

Uninstall

To remove all Entropy mods safely, follow this instruction: 1.Remove all Entropy mods except Entropy.Common 2.Load and save the game, exit 3.Remove Entropy.Common mod. Discussion: Discord Source code: Github WARNING: This is a StationeersLaunchPad Plugin Mod. It requires Bepinex to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin. See: StationeersLaunchPad Github page
ModMetadata.ChangeLog: [h1]Update v1.0.0.458 to v1.0.0.344[/h1] [list] [*] Fixes to Increment-Version.ps1. Made InGameDescription assembly attribute optional, added automatic conversion from [BBCode] to Unity's TMP's markup. Added support for steam unsupported [BBCode] attributes (those are used in generated in-game description and removed from description) Added [br] tag instead of line breaks for better formatting in AssemblyInfo.cs files. Extended Entropy.Common description. [/list]
